title: Supply Chain Manager - Delhivery - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Delhivery - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhivery. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
